channel.desc: An encoded ID that represents a channel, private group, or DM

markdown_text.desc: Accepts message text formatted in markdown. Limit this field to 12,000 characters. This text is what will be appended to the message received so far.

ts.desc: The timestamp of the streaming message.

desc: Appends text to an existing streaming conversation.

errors.as_user_not_supported: The `as_user` parameter does not function with workspace apps.
errors.duplicate_message_not_found: No duplicate message exists associated with `client_msg_id`.
errors.invalid_blocks: Blocks submitted with this message are not valid.
errors.invalid_chunks: Chunks submitted with this message are not valid.
errors.message_limit_exceeded: Members on this team are sending too many messages. For more details, see https://slack.com/help/articles/115002422943-Usage-limits-for-free-workspaces
errors.message_not_in_streaming_state: The message is not in the streaming state.
errors.message_not_owned_by_app: The message is not owned by the app.
errors.messages_tab_disabled: Messages tab for the app is disabled.
errors.metadata_must_be_sent_from_app: Message metadata can only be posted or updated using an app-level token
errors.msg_blocks_too_long: Blocks submitted with this message are too long.
errors.msg_blocks_too_many: Max blocks exceeded, blocks are limited to 50 per message.
errors.not_in_channel: Cannot post user messages to a channel they are not in.
errors.rate_limited: Application has posted too many messages, read the Rate Limit documentation for more information
errors.restricted_action: A workspace preference prevents the authenticated user from posting.
errors.restricted_action_non_threadable_channel: Cannot post thread replies into a non\_threadable channel.
errors.restricted_action_read_only_channel: Cannot post any message into a read-only channel.
errors.restricted_action_thread_locked: Cannot post replies to a thread that has been locked by admins.
errors.restricted_action_thread_only_channel: Cannot post top-level messages into a thread-only channel.
errors.slack_connect_canvas_sharing_blocked: Admin has disabled Canvas File sharing in all Slack Connect communications
errors.slack_connect_file_link_sharing_blocked: Admin has disabled Slack File sharing in all Slack Connect communications
errors.slack_connect_lists_sharing_blocked: Admin has disabled Lists sharing in all Slack Connect communications
errors.stopped_by_user: The streaming message was stopped by the user and no further appends are accepted.
errors.team_not_found: This error occurs if, when using an org-wide token, the `channel_name` is passed instead of the `channel_id`.
errors.too_many_attachments: Too many attachments were provided with this message. A maximum of 100 attachments are allowed on a message.
errors.too_many_contact_cards: Too many contact\_cards were provided with this message. A maximum of 10 contact cards are allowed on a message.
